NAME

SYNOPSIS

DESCRIPTION

The and functions compare the null-terminated strings and and return an integer greater than, equal to, or less than 0, according as is lexicographically greater than, equal to, or less than after translation of each corresponding character to lower-case. The strings themselves are not modified. The comparison is done using unsigned characters, so that is greater than The compares at most characters.

SEE ALSO

HISTORY

The and functions are
